title: The 12-Dimensional Cosmic Synapse Theory: Audio-Driven Deterministic Cosmological Simulation Engine with Adaptive Memory, Live Embodied Particle Mapping, Quantum Hardware Integration, and Empirical Astrophysical Validation
description: Comprehensive framework modeling the universe as a neural-like network on an 11-dimensional spacetime manifold with a 12th adaptive internal state dimension. Validated through genuine IBM Quantum hardware integration (1,705 runs, 6,975,488 shots, 99.842% Shannon entropy efficiency), Chang'e-4/LND harmonic alignment (0.641144), and a v5 validated unified transport router across MSL/RAD, CRaTER/LRO, Chandrayaan-1 RADOM, Mars FD, and Mars ICME transit datasets. Includes autonomous multi-model AI swarm (CosmoSynapse) with Hebbian plasticity, Lyapunov-gated recursive self-modification, and quantum entropy injection.

creators.name: Davis, Cory Shane
creators.affiliation: Self Studies, a Cosmic Synaptic Mobius Co., River Pines, California

notes: Paper Version 2.1 (April 2026). Updated with: (1) 1,705 archived quantum runs across 6,975,488 shots on ibm_fez, ibm_kingston, ibm_marrakesh; (2) v5 validated unified transport router across 5 independent astrophysical datasets; (3) Chang'e-4/LND harmonic alignment at 0.641144; (4) Bootstrap confidence intervals and ablation studies; (5) CosmoSynapse autonomous multi-model AI swarm with Genesis Record. Independently cited at Lunds Universitet, Sweden (course SKOC29).
